title: Decken Demands Shirahoshi
description: On pages 0–3, this part follows Shirahoshi, Unknown person #1, Narrator, Vander Decken, Luffy, King Neptune, Jinbe. The core story beat is decken demands shirahoshi.
scene: The scene centers on decken demands shirahoshi, with Shirahoshi, Unknown person #1, Narrator, Vander Decken, Luffy, King Neptune, Jinbe driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii is being kidnapped right now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crybaby!! Why did you get out of the shark?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: I... I'm so sorry, Luffy-Sama! Please don't get angry with me... UWAAAHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: He made the Princess cry!!! This pirate is pure evil!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Don't do it, SanjIII!! Don't you dare turn around!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Everyone keeps saying "princess"... y...you don't mean

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: You'd better not be saying that the mermaid Princess is standing right behind me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! She's right there! So don't turn around, Sanji, no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: If you see the mermaid Princess, you'll be dead for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The mermaid Princess...that most wondrous of all mermaids, said to rival even the pirate empress, the world's finest beauty... is standing right behind my back...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How could I bear to live knowing that I let such a chance slip through my fingers?...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: chopper... I choose to fulfil my dream, and go to my death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I thought your dream was to find all blue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't do it, Sanji!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Trump

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even my wildest imaginatives pale in comparison... she is... magnificent...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No work of art could hope to compare... this is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...True beauty...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He turned to stone Eeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, HACH!! Who the heck did this to you?! Tell me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is a totally new symptom!! Is it because of the Okama blood in his system?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: !... Luffy- Sama... what should I...? Uwaah HHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The following assessment

summary: Decken Demands Shirahoshi. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
